/owners/

Identified owners

The people and institutions whose books, taken from them, have been traced back to their names. Most volumes in the register carry an owner mark that has not yet been resolved to a person; these have.

Rabbi Mordecai Kremer (Kaunas)Kremer ownership stamps, cross-referenced against the Offenbach monthly processing lists→
Provenance research & text: Bruce Nielsen · Penn Libraries, Katz Center for Advanced Judaic StudiesUncertainty in this record is shown, not hidden.
